---
title: "Test 3 Platform Post"
subtitle: ""
description: "One or two sentences."
abstract: ""
author:
  - name: ""
    affiliation: ""
    orcid: ""
    email: ""
date: 2026-07-14
date-modified: last-modified
categories:
  - data-science
  - r
  - linguistics
  - pottery
  - aikido
  - brug
  - personal
  - reproducibility
  - productivity
  - coding
status: published
publish_to:
  - erwinlares
  - caow
  - brug
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: Contents
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: false
    css: styles.css
execute:
  include: true
  echo: true
  message: false
  error: false
---

Just a test post checking that it will post to all the platforms
